runtime: Offline WebGL2 / ES modules / IndexedDB / Web Audio / MediaRecorder

releaseProfile.camera: World-space target, exact transform keys, editable motion presets
releaseProfile.editing: Move, trim, split, razor, slip, ripple, snap, markers, clipboard, track reorder
releaseProfile.audio: Music, dialogue, SFX, waveform decode, fades, gain, stereo pan, voice recording
releaseProfile.portability: Project JSON and portable ZIP with media remapping and SHA256SUMS
releaseProfile.library: Top-bar full-character saves with model, textures, current state, preview, checksums, and one-click restoration
releaseProfile.ui: Resizable brushed-metal docks, five task-focused layouts, searchable accordion inspectors, main-panel search/core filters, command palette, animation previews, compact overlay panels, and accessible tooltips.

qa.browserPath: Playwright Chromium under Xvfb with software WebGL2; Browser plugin unavailable and direct local navigation blocked by policy
